title: Fix public endpoints auth and path traversal

log.context: Fix public endpoints auth and path traversal

Both services restarted cleanly. Here's a summary of all changes made:

---

**Issue 1: Unauthenticated public endpoints — `/home/clungus/work/hello-world/serve.py`**

Added `_is_authed()` checks (returning 401 with `login_url`) to four previously open GET endpoints:
- `/api/tasks` — was fully open, now requires `tauth_github` cookie
- `/api/agents` — same
- `/api/congress/sessions` — same
- `/api/congress/sessions/<id>` — same
